finalVerdict.label: Plan-first — correct extraction locus, pre-implementation gates required
finalVerdict.notA_because: Bad-path GPT raw missing; post-prompt 10× stability not run; prompt-only sufficiency LOW; interaction model requires joint prompt+schema validation — not ready to implement
finalVerdict.notC_because: Root cause proven at extraction; scope closed at 2 products; passc 7-row control isolates Hybrid H delta; downstream binding ruled out; extraction-source strategically correct per strategy-comparison
recommendedSequence: 1. Capture bad-path Hybrid H structured GPT raw (capture-hybrid-h.deno.ts)
2. Characterize structured-null bad-path profile vs Rolo control at emission
3. Design joint prompt+schema validation plan (not single-lever) — planning only
4. Execute scoped prompt counterfactual audit against Mammafiore controls
5. Live 10× Bocconcino re-extract after candidate extraction change
6. Full validation matrix: Ricotta, Mezzi, Pomodori, Rolo, Acqua, Gorgonzola, f0aa5a08, 15-row corpus
7. Dry-run VL re-ingest impact before any persist
finalVerdict.strategicAlignment: Extraction-source (Hybrid H) is the correct foundation fix locus; implementation blocked until blocking items resolved
finalVerdict.optionCContext: Binding Option C has offline replay path but runtime-equivalence verdict C (not equivalent); sanity review NOT READY — reinforces extraction-first planning priority without selecting binding path
